testcase.name: test_01_register_new_user

failure.message: AssertionError: Auth/me check failed after registration assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_singularity_api.py:79: in test_01_register_new_user assert me_response.status_code == 200, f"Auth/me check failed after registration" E AssertionError: Auth/me check failed after registration E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_login_existing_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_singularity_api.py:91: in test_02_login_existing_user assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: 401 - {"detail":"Email not confirmed"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
